description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest that tests multiple Python versions (3.8, 3.9, 3.11) and Robot Framework versions (3.2.0, 4.1.0, 5.0.0, 6.0.0, 6.1.0). For each combination, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install Tox and dependencies from requirements.txt, and run Tox with the Python version in PATH.
